headline: 3 Reasons to Sell TRMB and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Trimble’s shares (currently trading at $65.87) have posted a disappointing 19.6% loss while the S&P 500 was down 1%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
